title: Small Head Silk Gerbera Flower Stem Quality Artificial Flowers In Many Colours
features: 8cm Silk Head and Adjustable Green Stem
Lots Of Colours To Choose From. Currently Selecting SAGE GREEN
Suitable For Large Vases Or Cut Stems To Put In Small Vases
description: Single artificial Gerbera flower stems with silk heads and adjutable green stems. These quality gerbera flowers are sure to make great visual displays around the home, office or for a special occasion. They are available in many colours and can be cut to reduce the height for smaller vases or used in larger vases.
